name: Sarah M.
one_line_review: "Synup is a great product with a wonderful support team"
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

Synup is a very user-friendly platform that has added value to our company's marketing package. Our agency was also assigned an outstanding account manager named Bridget who is always there when we need something.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

There are no dislikes for me! Any questions I had were answered, and I was also offered training to help me understand the platform's features. They are great :)

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

It is easy for our customers to manage multiple profiles in one place. Synup has made it easier for customers to update info, collect/ manage reviews, and set up posts across multiple platforms.
reviewer_details:
Support Specialist II

Small-Business (50 or fewer emp.)

‍
